name: Changshu Tianyin Electromechanical Co.,Ltd
summary: Changshu Tianyin Electromechanical Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of refrigerator compressor parts in China. It offers mold design centers; overheat and overload protectors; current start relays; PTC starter relays; no power electronic starters; plastic suction mufflers for various refrigerator compressors; plastic spring supports/spring stands; junction boxes for various refrigeration appliances/terminal boxes of appliances; and integrated low power PTC starters. The company offers its products under the TY brand name. Changshu Tianyin Electromechanical Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Changshu, China.
